 {"id":"beads_rust-axr4","title":"E2E tests: history command","description":"# E2E Tests for `history` Command

## Commands to Test
- `br history list` - List backup snapshots
- `br history save` - Create backup
- `br history restore <id>` - Restore from backup
- `br history --json` - JSON output

## Test Cases
### Success Paths
1. Save creates backup, verify in list
2. Save multiple backups, verify chronological order
3. Restore backup, verify data restored
4. JSON output structure

### Error Cases
5. History before init → error
6. Restore non-existent backup → error
7. Restore with uncommitted changes → warning

### Edge Cases
8. Backup with 1000+ issues
9. Backup after sync
10. Restore to different branch (git context)
11. Backup retention/cleanup

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file: tests/e2e_history.rs
- [ ] 11+ test functions
- [ ] Verify backup files in .beads/.br_history/","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"OpusClaude","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T14:27:04.155203750Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T17:36:22.923571913Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T17:36:22.923571913Z","close_reason":"Completed E2E tests for history command: 15 tests covering list, diff, restore, prune, error cases, and edge cases. Also fixed proptest_hash.rs to match updated content_hash_from_parts signature.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"beads_rust-axr4","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-oxmd","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-b0gt","title":"Document MCP serve as a first-class agent integration surface","description":"Reality-check finding: CHANGELOG.md advertises the optional MCP server and src/mcp/mod.rs plus the serve subcommand implement direct AI agent integration, but README.md and docs/AGENT_INTEGRATION.md only mention Agent Mail and shell/JSON workflows; CLI_REFERENCE.md has no serve section. Acceptance: add feature-gated br serve documentation, expected transport, safety/locking behavior, tool list discovery, and when to prefer MCP over shelling out.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T20:05:48.821348463Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T21:02:44.369542470Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T21:02:44.369197824Z","close_reason":"Documented feature-gated MCP serve in README, AGENTS, agent integration guide, and CLI reference, including stdio transport, tools/resources/prompts, safety/locking behavior, and when to prefer MCP over shell JSON","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","mcp","reality-check"],"comments":[{"id":275,"issue_id":"beads_rust-b0gt","author":"Codex4","text":"degraded-coordination: Agent Mail unavailable; files: AGENTS.md, README.md, docs/AGENT_INTEGRATION.md, docs/CLI_REFERENCE.md","created_at":"2026-04-21T20:57:30Z"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-b20","title":"E2E workflows: CRUD + deps + ready/blocked + search","description":"Implement E2E workflow tests: init/create/update/show/list/search/close/reopen/ready/blocked/dep/labels/comments/stats. Validate text + JSON outputs and side effects.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Coverage for full issue lifecycle + dependency workflows.
2) JSON output shapes validated for machine mode; text output sanity checks.
3) Each test has structured logs to aid failures.","notes":"E2E workflows now cover: list/show text output + quick capture + sync roundtrip/manifest/status (text+json) + version (text+json) + doctor --json (tests/e2e_basic_lifecycle.rs); dep add/list/remove + blocked JSON + close --suggest-next + close blocked/force (tests/e2e_relations.rs); ready/blocked/search text outputs + count text output (tests/e2e_queries.rs). **COMPLETED**: stats text+JSON output with --by-type/--by-priority breakdowns; config --list/--get/--path/--json; reopen with --reason and --json (all 3 tests in tests/e2e_queries.rs, verified passing). All E2E workflow gaps now addressed.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T16:18:47.223827825Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T04:45:49.216437701Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T04:45:49.216437701Z","close_reason":"E2E tests for stats, config, and reopen commands added to tests/e2e_queries.rs. All tests pass. All workflow gaps addressed.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"compacted_at_commit":"","original_size":0}
-{"id":"beads_rust-b2da","title":"[LOW] BeadsError::Other (anyhow bridge) still used in 7 production sites","description":"The BeadsError::Other(anyhow::Error) variant was added as a 'gradual migration bridge' from anyhow to structured errors. Seven production sites still use it:

1. src/cli/commands/upgrade.rs:219 — self-update error wrapping
2. src/cli/commands/version.rs:290,299,304,310 — curl/GitHub API errors (4 sites)
3. src/storage/sqlite.rs:2107 — consistency assertion (id mismatch)
4. src/sync/mod.rs:2397,2407 — post-import FK validation (2 sites)
5. src/error/context.rs:66 — OptionExt trait implementation

Additionally, logging.rs uses anyhow::Result directly instead of BeadsError::Result.

All Other errors map to ErrorCode::InternalError (exit code 1) with zero structured context — agents get no hint, no retryability signal, and no context field.

Fix: Replace with specific BeadsError variants or use existing structured variants (e.g., Database for sqlite.rs, Config for version.rs).","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"chore","assignee":"pane6","created_at":"2026-04-22T22:00:58.117601418Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T22:36:06.554927932Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debt","error-handling"],"comments":[{"id":348,"issue_id":"beads_rust-b2da","author":"orchestrator","text":"Reclaim: pane3 codex died 3× during this session after running rch-offloaded builds; each respawn failed within minutes. Abandoning pane 3. Reopening for reassignment to another cod pane.","created_at":"2026-04-22T22:34:35Z"},{"id":349,"issue_id":"beads_rust-b2da","author":"pane6","text":"degraded-coordination: Agent Mail MCP resources unavailable in this session; intended files: src/error/**, src/cli/commands/upgrade.rs, src/storage/sqlite.rs, src/sync/mod.rs","created_at":"2026-04-22T22:36:06Z"}]}
+{"id":"beads_rust-b2da","title":"[LOW] BeadsError::Other (anyhow bridge) still used in 7 production sites","description":"The BeadsError::Other(anyhow::Error) variant was added as a 'gradual migration bridge' from anyhow to structured errors. Seven production sites still use it:

1. src/cli/commands/upgrade.rs:219 — self-update error wrapping
2. src/cli/commands/version.rs:290,299,304,310 — curl/GitHub API errors (4 sites)
3. src/storage/sqlite.rs:2107 — consistency assertion (id mismatch)
4. src/sync/mod.rs:2397,2407 — post-import FK validation (2 sites)
5. src/error/context.rs:66 — OptionExt trait implementation

Additionally, logging.rs uses anyhow::Result directly instead of BeadsError::Result.

All Other errors map to ErrorCode::InternalError (exit code 1) with zero structured context — agents get no hint, no retryability signal, and no context field.

Fix: Replace with specific BeadsError variants or use existing structured variants (e.g., Database for sqlite.rs, Config for version.rs).","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"chore","assignee":"pane6","created_at":"2026-04-22T22:00:58.117601418Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T22:58:34.102878558Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T22:58:34.102504427Z","close_reason":"Removed BeadsError::Other(anyhow) bridge and implicit anyhow conversions in src; typed variants now cover upgrade, external command, validation, internal, storage, sync, and logging errors. Verified no BeadsError::Other/anyhow bridge matches remain; check/clippy and targeted tests pass. Full cargo test still fails in unrelated e2e_concurrency lock tests, filed as beads_rust-46y2. Code commits: 4388181, 95ef8d9, 9b971f5.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debt","error-handling"],"comments":[{"id":348,"issue_id":"beads_rust-b2da","author":"orchestrator","text":"Reclaim: pane3 codex died 3× during this session after running rch-offloaded builds; each respawn failed within minutes. Abandoning pane 3. Reopening for reassignment to another cod pane.","created_at":"2026-04-22T22:34:35Z"},{"id":349,"issue_id":"beads_rust-b2da","author":"pane6","text":"degraded-coordination: Agent Mail MCP resources unavailable in this session; intended files: src/error/**, src/cli/commands/upgrade.rs, src/storage/sqlite.rs, src/sync/mod.rs","created_at":"2026-04-22T22:36:06Z"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-b4g","title":"E2E scenario: init/create/update/list/show/close","description":"# E2E: Basic Lifecycle

## Steps
- br init
- br create (title/desc/type/priority)
- br update (status/priority/assignee)
- br list + br show validations
- br close + reopen as needed

## Logging
- Record all commands, env, cwd, and outputs.

## Assertions
- JSON output shapes and key field transitions.","notes":"Added E2E test tests/e2e_basic_lifecycle.rs using new harness to cover init/create/update/list/show/close via update.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T16:26:29.424978320Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T16:48:54.930324137Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T16:48:54.930324137Z","close_reason":"Added E2E basic lifecycle test","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"compacted_at_commit":"","original_size":0}
 {"id":"beads_rust-b4nj","title":"Dataset integrity guard + provenance logging","description":"Protect source datasets and capture provenance for reproducibility.

Scope
- Hash source .beads contents before and after copy; assert unchanged.
- Record dataset provenance (path, hash, issue count) in summary.json.
- Optionally allow per-run dataset overrides with explicit logging.

Acceptance
- Tests fail if source datasets are mutated.
- Provenance info is emitted in logs for every run.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-18T03:53:25.165964295Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T04:31:14.176142663Z","closed_at":"2026-01-18T04:31:14.176142663Z","close_reason":"Implemented DatasetIntegrityGuard, DatasetProvenance, DatasetOverride, and run_with_integrity(). All 20 unit tests pass. Provides: SHA256 hashing before/after copy, full provenance metadata for summary.json, and explicit override logging.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"beads_rust-b4nj","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-7wqg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"beads_rust-b4nj","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-ag35","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"beads_rust-b4nj","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-x7z8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-08T22:47:30Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":119,"issue_id":"beads_rust-b4nj","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Provenance logging should include source repo commit hash if available (via git rev-parse), but must not run any git command outside the copied workspace when source lacks .git.","created_at":"2026-01-18T03:54:19Z"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-b4yu","title":"Implement --robot-help flag for machine-readable help","description":"# --robot-help Flag Implementation

## Purpose
Provide machine-readable help output that AI coding agents can parse to understand available commands, flags, and their semantics.

## Technical Requirements

### Output Format
```json
{
  "name": "br",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Rust port of beads issue tracker",
  "commands": [
    {
      "name": "create",
      "description": "Create a new issue",
      "aliases": ["new", "add"],
      "flags": [
        {
          "name": "--title",
          "short": "-t",
          "type": "string",
          "required": true,
          "description": "Issue title"
        },
        {
          "name": "--priority",
          "short": "-p",
          "type": "integer",
          "required": false,
          "default": 2,
          "valid_range": [0, 4],
          "description": "Priority level (0=critical, 4=backlog)"
        }
      ],
      "examples": [
        "br create --title 'Fix login bug' --priority 1"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "global_flags": [
    {
      "name": "--json",
      "description": "Output in JSON format"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Implementation
- Add `--robot-help` flag to main CLI
- Generate JSON from clap's command structure
- Include all subcommands recursively
- Include examples for each command
- Include valid value ranges/enums

### Clap Integration
```rust
fn generate_robot_help(cmd: \u0026Command) -> serde_json::Value {
    // Recursively build JSON from clap Command
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `br --robot-help` outputs valid JSON
- [ ] All commands are documented
- [ ] All flags include types and constraints
- [ ] Examples are included
- [ ] Output is deterministic (sorted keys)

## References
- cass --robot-help implementation
- clap Command introspection API","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T18:49:19.430131440Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T18:54:36.656781569Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T18:54:36.656781569Z","close_reason":"ERROR: --robot-help is bv's domain. bv provides all robot-mode flags.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"compacted_at_commit":"","original_size":0}
